source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
